mapper.select: SELECT st_access_token, st_refresh_token, dt_expires_at AS expires_at, st_email FROM t_google_gmail_oauth WHERE id_oauth = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_google_gmail_oauth ( id_oauth, st_access_token, st_refresh_token, dt_expires_at, st_email, dt_updated ) VALUES ( 1, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt}, #{email}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (id_oauth) DO UPDATE SET st_access_token = EXCLUDED.st_access_token, st_refresh_token = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.st_refresh_token, t_google_gmail_oauth.st_refresh_token), dt_expires_at = EXCLUDED.dt_expires_at, st_email = EXCLUDED.st_email, dt_updated = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
